description: Detects exception safety issues in C++: raw new without smart pointer wrapper, mutex.lock() without lock_guard, FILE* from fopen() without RAII. Simplified from Rust per D-07: matches new_expression nodes broadly (cannot verify try/catch presence, noexcept specifier, or smart pointer context without parent-chain analysis).

flag.message: new expression detected -- verify raw new is wrapped in a smart pointer (unique_ptr, shared_ptr) or protected by try/catch to prevent resource leaks if an exception is thrown. Prefer std::make_unique/std::make_shared. Verify mutex.lock() is replaced by lock_guard. Verify FILE* from fopen() uses RAII wrapper.
